intended_outcomes: Preview-first 2-column CMS layout: main preview stage + contextual inspector sidebar
Inspector starts empty, then populates only after clicking an editable preview element
Subtle hover outline in preview signals editable targets
Selection ring appears on clicked editable element
Image inspector includes thumbnail, source input, upload/drag-drop, alt text, title
Text inspector includes content editor and quick typography controls
Viewport controls (Mobile, Tablet, Laptop, Wide) change preview frame width

notes: Tested in VS Code integrated browser tooling
Preview is loaded in an iframe
file:// origin can affect storage behavior across files

test_cases.name: Login and editor boot
test_cases.expected: Successful login reveals CMS workspace and live preview
test_cases.observed: Pass. Login with admin/admin opened workspace and iframe preview.

test_cases.name: 2-column layout structure
test_cases.expected: Preview is primary stage; inspector is secondary contextual panel
test_cases.observed: Pass. Layout renders as preview-first with contextual right sidebar.

test_cases.name: Viewport controls
test_cases.expected: Mobile/Tablet/Laptop/Wide buttons update active state and viewport
test_cases.observed: Pass. Active state changed correctly for Laptop and Wide in UI.

test_cases.name: Text element selection
test_cases.expected: Clicking editable text opens text inspector for that field
test_cases.observed: Pass. Clicking hero/product text opened text inspector with correct path and controls.

test_cases.name: Image element selection
test_cases.expected: Clicking editable image opens image inspector with metadata fields
test_cases.observed: Pass. Clicking product image opened image inspector with source + Alt Text + Image Title.

test_cases.name: Link element selection
test_cases.expected: Clicking editable link should select link field and show link target control
test_cases.observed: Pass after refactor. Click on product quick link selects productQuickLinks.1.label and reveals Link Target control; cross-section selection also resolves when field belongs to a different section.

test_cases.name: Selected text -> live preview reflect
test_cases.expected: Editing selected text should be visible in live preview flow
test_cases.observed: Pass after refactor. Editing selected link/text field updates the iframe element text immediately in the same session.

test_cases.name: Reset field behavior
test_cases.expected: Reset field should restore selected field from default dataset
test_cases.observed: Pass after refactor. Reset restores inspector and preview value and removes the override path from localStorage.

primary_findings.impact: Link selections now enter inspector mode and expose link controls.
Field edits now patch iframe nodes in real time.
Reset now clears override and fully restores default value state.

primary_findings.issue: Typography controls currently apply visual style in preview only and are not persisted to dataset schema.
primary_findings.impact: Formatting can be lost after reload and is not part of durable content model.

recommended_fix_plan.title: Stabilize clickable-link selection in preview
actions: Implemented composedPath-based target resolution with closest fallback
Prevented default navigation for editable click targets in capture phase
Added cross-section selection fallback in setSelectedElement

recommended_fix_plan.title: Fix preview update feedback loop
actions: Added direct iframe node patching in applyFieldValue for text, links, images, and video source/poster
Kept existing save/override flow while making in-session preview updates immediate

recommended_fix_plan.title: Harden reset semantics
actions: Reset now removes the selected field override path from localStorage
Portal rerender after reset keeps inspector and preview aligned to defaults

recommended_fix_plan.title: Decide persistence model for typography/link-target controls
actions: If required long-term, add schema fields and write/read mapping in site dataset
If preview-only, label controls as temporary preview styling

post_fix_verification.summary: Re-test completed after admin.js refactor; previously failing cases now pass.

evidence.details: Selecting productQuickLinks.1.label from preview produced selectedPath=productQuickLinks.1.label and hasLinkTarget=true.
Inspector value QA Link Label Update patched to iframe text node in-session.
Reset restored inspector + preview value to default and cleared overrideValue (null) for productQuickLinks.1.label.

remaining_risk: Typography controls still rely on in-memory previewInspectorState and are not persisted in the content schema.

prompt_template_for_external_ai: Evaluate PN Medical admin portal implementation against intended UX goals using this dataset. Prioritize functional regressions over style opinions. Return: (1) severity-ranked defects with likely root cause, (2) exact fix patches by file, (3) minimal regression test matrix, (4) release readiness decision.
cleanup_note: Any local test override values were cleared from localStorage at end of this test session.
